utility_evaluation.REASONING: First, count the number of items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget — that's 5 items in total. Next, check the final coverage plan: it has health_coverage (with both physical and mental health details and a total cost), property_coverage (home/contents insurance details with cost), travel_coverage (travel insurance details with cost), additional_services (enhancement services with cost), and total_budget (monthly/annual breakdown). All five required items are present and fully specified with descriptions and costs as required.
